caption: A man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a light-blue dress shirt, is captured in a sequence of frames during a formal proceeding. He is seated behind a desk or table, with a dark jacket and a red bag with a cartoon character visible behind him. On-screen text identifies the event as "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" and a green banner reads "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage," accompanied by the "ORCA" logo. As the sequence progresses, the man transitions from a still, attentive posture to an active one, lifting his right arm and gesturing with his hand while speaking. The background remains constant, showing a light-colored wall and a vent, while the man's movements shift from a neutral gaze to an animated expression of communication.
